bio: I'm Kaeleigh, a UX Designer passionate about creating experiences that are both intuitive and meaningful. I believe great design starts with deeply understanding the people you're designing for.
My work spans government services, enterprise systems, and consumer products — with a consistent focus on clarity, accessibility, and human-centred thinking.
When I'm not designing, you'll find me illustrating, exploring new tools, or hunting for the perfect coffee shop.

testimonials.quote: Kaeleigh did a great job for us. She was dependable and produced quality work. She also stepped up to take on additional leadership responsibilities for our small group when the opportunity presented itself.
testimonials.name: Mike Jones
testimonials.title: Associate Professor of Computer Science, Brigham Young University
